# British IPTV 4K

> British IPTV built for UK homes. 37,000 live channels, 198,000 on-demand films and series, native 4K UHD streaming and five simultaneous screens per account — from £8.66/month with a 30-day money-back guarantee.

British IPTV 4K is a UK-focused IPTV subscription service. Every plan includes the full channel library, native 4K where broadcast, five simultaneous screens and a 30-day money-back guarantee. An optional Secure Proxy add-on is available from £4.75 per term.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://british-iptv-4k.com/): Overview, pricing plans and features
- [IPTV Subscription UK](https://british-iptv-4k.com/iptv-subscription-uk): All plan options with per-month pricing and inclusions
- [Blog](https://british-iptv-4k.com/blog): Guides and comparisons
- [Contact](https://british-iptv-4k.com/contact): Support channels and shared UK mailbox
- [Pricing](https://british-iptv-4k.com/#pricing): Current plan prices and included features

## Guides

- [Best IPTV UK Guide](https://british-iptv-4k.com/blog/best-iptv-uk-guide-2026): Five popular ways UK households stream TV compared
- [Fire Stick Setup Guide](https://british-iptv-4k.com/blog/how-to-setup-iptv-firestick): Step-by-step installation
